title: Create: Magics
description: This mod tends to try and combine "Create" and "Mana & Artifice" mods by adding intermediate content
body:
This mod tends to try and combine "Create" and "Mana & Artifice" mods by adding intermediate content

 

Current features added:

To Create

- Mana Powered Motor - Allows to generate rotation from mana passed to it

To Mana & Atrifice

- Mana Route Spell - Allows to pass mana to components requiring it (For example: Mana Powered Motor)

To itself
- Mana Storage - A convenient way to store mana, so you can finally step away from that motor

Note: This mod is yet to undergo development to add new features
